# Transcrição: 02 Product + USP

- **Fonte:** 02 Product + USP
- **Duração:** 01:22
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

## [00:00 - 01:22]

Next you want to include your USP and connect this to your product specifically. This is very important. Here's what I mean by that. Here's an example slide. The Every Other Day Diet is the first lifestyle friendly diet plan ever created that allows you to eat your favorite foods and still lose all the weight you want. If you will remember back from the USP Factory video, this is my USP. All I've done here is added the words the Every Other Day Diet. All you would do is add the words the name of my product or service is USP. Now you see yet again why we started with the USP Factory and how important the USP is. It's used continually through a video sales letter. But now you're wanting to say here is the overall big picture element of the one thing that I want you to believe. This is the one thing I want you to believe. And if you go into a video sales letter close asking your viewer to believe more than one thing you will bomb. All I'm asking them to believe, again we've walked through this with the USP Factory. If you don't remember it go look at the video. Hopefully you've done the homework. And all I'm doing is saying this is the one thing I'm asking you to believe that you can eat your favorite foods and still lose all the weight you want. Now obviously this is applied to my particular product. You would apply it to yours. You would use the name of your product and your USP here.
